tasks.label: build-part1
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make

tasks.label: run-part1-sample
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\sample_scenario.json

tasks.label: run-part1-all-scenarios
tasks.command: $scenarios = @('sample_scenario.json','scenario_low_risk.json','scenario_medium_risk.json','scenario_high_risk.json'); foreach ($s in $scenarios) { Write-Host "--- $s ---"; $out = .\bin\sat_sim.exe ".\scenarios\$s"; $out | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===|^total_cycles=|^cpu_utilization_pct=|^energy_mj=|^budget_status=' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; $risk = ($out | Select-String '\[risk\].*HIGH-RISK').Count; $man = ($out | Select-String '\[maneuver\]').Count; Write-Host "high_risk_events=$risk maneuvers=$man" }

tasks.label: commit-final-clean-tasks
tasks.command: git add .vscode/tasks.json; git commit --message 'Final clean Part 1 task config'

tasks.label: push-final-main
tasks.command: git push -u origin main

tasks.label: final-post-push-status
tasks.command: git status --short --branch; git remote -v; git log --oneline -1

tasks.label: run-edge-case-scenarios
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; $scenarios = @('scenario_zero_debris.json','scenario_single_debris.json','scenario_max_debris.json','scenario_tight_energy.json','scenario_long_horizon.json'); foreach ($s in $scenarios) { Write-Host "--- $s ---"; $out = .\bin\sat_sim.exe ".\scenarios\$s"; $out | Select-String '^\[init\]|^\[risk\]|^\[maneuver\]|^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===|^total_cycles=|^cpu_utilization_pct=|^energy_mj=|^budget_status=' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line } }

tasks.label: rebuild-and-rerun-edge-cases
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; $scenarios = @('scenario_zero_debris.json','scenario_single_debris.json','scenario_max_debris.json','scenario_tight_energy.json','scenario_long_horizon.json'); foreach ($s in $scenarios) { Write-Host "--- $s ---"; $out = .\bin\sat_sim.exe ".\scenarios\$s"; $out | Select-String '^\[init\]|^\[risk\]|^\[maneuver\]|^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===|^total_cycles=|^cpu_utilization_pct=|^energy_mj=|^budget_status=' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line } }

tasks.label: run-all-scenarios-health-check
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path ..\results | Out-Null; $rows = @(); $failed = $false; Get-ChildItem .\scenarios -Filter *.json | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { $name = $_.Name; $out = .\bin\sat_sim.exe $_.FullName; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; $hasInit = (($out | Select-String '^\[init\]').Count -gt 0); $hasSummary = (($out | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===').Count -gt 0); $totalCycles = (($out | Select-String '^total_cycles=' | Select-Object -Last 1).Line -replace 'total_cycles=',''); $cpuUtil = (($out | Select-String '^cpu_utilization_pct=' | Select-Object -Last 1).Line -replace 'cpu_utilization_pct=',''); $energyLine = (($out | Select-String '^energy_mj=' | Select-Object -Last 1).Line); $budgetStatus = (($out | Select-String '^budget_status=' | Select-Object -Last 1).Line -replace 'budget_status=',''); $riskCount = ($out | Select-String '^\[risk\]').Count; $maneuverCount = ($out | Select-String '^\[maneuver\]').Count; if ($exitCode -ne 0 -or -not $hasSummary -or -not $hasInit) { $failed = $true }; $rows += [PSCustomObject]@{scenario=$name; exit_code=$exitCode; has_init=$hasInit; has_summary=$hasSummary; total_cycles=$totalCycles; cpu_utilization_pct=$cpuUtil; energy_line=$energyLine; budget_status=$budgetStatus; risk_events=$riskCount; maneuvers=$maneuverCount}; Write-Host ("{0} | exit={1} summary={2} budget={3} risk={4} maneuver={5}" -f $name,$exitCode,$hasSummary,$budgetStatus,$riskCount,$maneuverCount) }; $csvPath = '..\results\all_scenarios_check.csv'; $rows | Export-Csv -NoTypeInformation $csvPath; Write-Host "CSV=$csvPath"; if ($failed) { Write-Error 'One or more scenarios failed basic health checks.'; exit 1 } else { Write-Host 'ALL_SCENARIOS_PASS_BASIC_HEALTH' }

tasks.label: quick-all-scenarios-passcheck
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; $failed = @(); Get-ChildItem .\scenarios -Filter *.json | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { $out = .\bin\sat_sim.exe $_.FullName; $exitCode = $LASTEXITCODE; $hasInit = ($out | Select-String '^\[init\]').Count -gt 0; $hasSummary = ($out | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===').Count -gt 0; if ($exitCode -ne 0 -or -not $hasInit -or -not $hasSummary) { $failed += $_.Name } }; if ($failed.Count -eq 0) { Write-Host 'PASS_ALL_SCENARIOS' } else { Write-Host ('FAIL: ' + ($failed -join ', ')); exit 1 }

tasks.label: run-conic-scenario
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; $out = .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\conic_scenario_dataset.json; $out | Select-String '^\[init\]|^\[risk\]|^\[maneuver\]|^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===|^total_cycles=|^cpu_utilization_pct=|^energy_mj=|^budget_status=' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; if (($out | Select-String '^\[init\]').Count -eq 0 -or ($out | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===').Count -eq 0) { Write-Error 'Missing init or final summary in output'; exit 1 }

tasks.label: save-conic-output-log
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\conic_scenario_dataset.json > ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log; Write-Host "saved ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log"

tasks.label: save-conic-output-log-utf8
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\conic_scenario_dataset.json | Out-File -FilePath ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log -Encoding utf8

tasks.label: inspect-current-scenarios-json
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1\scenarios; Get-ChildItem -Filter *.json | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ('--- ' + $_.Name + ' ---'); Get-Content $_.FullName }

tasks.label: convert-scenarios-to-conic-format
tasks.command:
@'
import json
import math
from pathlib import Path

sc_dir = Path('part1/scenarios')
converted = []
skipped = []

for path in sorted(sc_dir.glob('*.json')):
    raw = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))

    # Already in timestamped conic-style format (e.g., keys like "0", "10", ...)
    if isinstance(raw, dict) and any(str(k).isdigit() for k in raw.keys()):
        skipped.append(path.name)
        continue

    horizon = int(raw.get('horizon_s', 180))
    step = int(raw.get('decision_step_s', 10))
    budget = int(raw.get('energy_budget_mj', 150000))
    sat_r = float(raw.get('sat_r_m', 6800000))
    sat_omega_mdegps = float(raw.get('sat_omega_mdegps', 60))
    debris_count = int(raw.get('debris_count', 8))

    if debris_count < 0:
        debris_count = 0
    if debris_count > 256:
        debris_count = 256

    sat_omega_rad_s = sat_omega_mdegps * (math.pi / 180000.0)

    def debris_at_t(i: int, t_s: int):
        base_r = 6799800.0 + i * 40.0
        base_theta_mdeg = 10000.0 + i * 4500.0
        vr = 1.0 if (i % 2 == 0) else -1.0
        vt = float(2 + (i % 3))

        r = base_r + vr * t_s
        theta_mdeg = (base_theta_mdeg + vt * t_s) % 360000.0
        theta_rad = theta_mdeg * (math.pi / 180000.0)

        return {
            'id': 100 + i,
            'r': round(r, 2),
            'theta': round(theta_rad, 6),
            'vr': round(vr, 2),
            'vt': round(vt, 2),
            'size': round((10 + i) / 100.0, 2)
        }

    out = {
        '0': {
            'simulation_parameters': {
                'horizon_s': horizon,
                'decision_step_s': step,
                'energy_budget_J': budget
            },
            'satellite_initial_state': {
                'radius_m': round(sat_r, 2),
                'angular_velocity_rad_s': sat_omega_rad_s
            },
            'debris_catalog': [debris_at_t(i, 0) for i in range(debris_count)]
        }
    }

    if step > 0 and horizon >= step:
        out[str(step)] = {
            'debris_catalog': [debris_at_t(i, step) for i in range(debris_count)]
        }

    path.write_text(json.dumps(out, indent=4), encoding='utf-8')
    converted.append(path.name)

print('converted:', ', '.join(converted) if converted else '(none)')
print('skipped (already conic-style):', ', '.join(skipped) if skipped else '(none)')
'@ | python -

tasks.label: run-converter-script
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; python .\convert_scenarios_to_conic.py

tasks.label: run-all-after-conversion
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; $failed = @(); Get-ChildItem .\scenarios -Filter *.json | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { $out = .\bin\sat_sim.exe $_.FullName; $ok = (($out | Select-String '^\[init\]').Count -gt 0) -and (($out | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===').Count -gt 0); if (-not $ok -or $LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $failed += $_.Name } }; if ($failed.Count -eq 0) { Write-Host 'PASS_ALL_SCENARIOS_AFTER_CONVERSION' } else { Write-Host ('FAIL: ' + ($failed -join ', ')); exit 1 }

tasks.label: refresh-all-scenario-logs
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path ..\results | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem .\scenarios -Filter *.json | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { $name = $_.BaseName; $outPath = "..\results\$name.log"; .\bin\sat_sim.exe $_.FullName | Out-File -FilePath $outPath -Encoding utf8; Write-Host "updated $outPath" }

tasks.label: refresh-all-scenario-logs-fixed
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path ..\results | Out-Null; Get-ChildItem .\scenarios -Filter *.json | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { $name = $_.BaseName + '.log'; $outPath = Join-Path '..\results' $name; .\bin\sat_sim.exe $_.FullName | Out-File -FilePath $outPath -Encoding utf8; Write-Host ('updated ' + $outPath) }

tasks.label: extract-expected-output-lines
tasks.command:
@'
from pypdf import PdfReader
reader = PdfReader('Problem Statement.pdf')
text = '\n'.join((p.extract_text() or '') for p in reader.pages)
keys = ['6.2', 'Behavior and Outputs at Runtime', 'Collision‑risk reports', 'SAFE/WATCH/HIGH‑RISK', 'Maneuver recommendations', 'Resource reports']
for k in keys:
    i = text.find(k)
    if i != -1:
        s = max(0, i-220)
        e = min(len(text), i+420)
        print('\n===== ' + k + ' =====')
        print(text[s:e])
'@ | python -

tasks.label: run-extract-expected-output-lines
tasks.command: python .\extract_expected_output_lines.py

tasks.label: verify-risk-class-output
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\conic_scenario_dataset.json | Out-File -FilePath ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log -Encoding utf8; Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log | Select-String '^\[risk\]' | Select-Object -First 20

tasks.label: cleanup-temp-pdf-script
tasks.command: if (Test-Path .\extract_expected_output_lines.py) { Remove-Item .\extract_expected_output_lines.py }

tasks.label: verify-rolling-telemetry-window
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\conic_scenario_dataset.json | Out-File -FilePath ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log -Encoding utf8; Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log | Select-String '^\[telemetry\]' | Select-Object -First 12

tasks.label: summarize-task-work-conic
tasks.command: $log = Get-Content .\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log; Write-Host 'T1_orbit_lines=' ($log | Select-String '^\[telemetry\]').Count; Write-Host 'T2_risk_lines=' ($log | Select-String '^\[risk\]').Count; Write-Host 'T3_maneuver_lines=' ($log | Select-String '^\[maneuver\]').Count; Write-Host 'T4_telemetry_lines=' ($log | Select-String '^\[telemetry\]').Count; Write-Host 'T6_tx_lines=' ($log | Select-String '^\[tx\]').Count; Write-Host 'final_summary_present=' ((($log | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===').Count) -gt 0); Write-Host 'task_cycle_lines:'; $log | Select-String '^task_cycles\.' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; Write-Host 'resource_lines:'; $log | Select-String '^active_cycles=|^cpu_utilization_pct=|^energy_mj=|^budget_status=' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }

tasks.label: verify-size-based-risk-thresholds
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\conic_scenario_dataset.json | Out-File -FilePath ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log -Encoding utf8; Write-Host 'first risk lines:'; Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log | Select-String '^\[risk\]' | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; Write-Host 'first maneuver lines:'; Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log | Select-String '^\[maneuver\]' | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }

tasks.label: rerun-and-check-current-risk-model
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\conic_scenario_dataset.json | Out-File -FilePath ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log -Encoding utf8; Write-Host 'run_complete=1'; Write-Host 'risk_lines=' ((Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log | Select-String '^\[risk\]').Count); Write-Host 'maneuver_lines=' ((Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log | Select-String '^\[maneuver\]').Count); Write-Host 'telemetry_lines=' ((Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log | Select-String '^\[telemetry\]').Count); Write-Host 'summary_present=' (((Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===').Count) -gt 0)

tasks.label: verify-maneuver-directionality
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\conic_scenario_dataset.json | Out-File -FilePath ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log -Encoding utf8; Write-Host 'maneuver samples:'; Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log | Select-String '^\[maneuver\]' | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; Write-Host 'risk around first maneuver:'; $lines = Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log; $m = ($lines | Select-String '^\[maneuver\]' | Select-Object -First 1).LineNumber; if ($m) { $start=[Math]::Max(1,$m-6); $end=[Math]::Min($lines.Count,$m+6); for($i=$start;$i -le $end;$i++){ Write-Host $lines[$i-1] } }

tasks.label: check-maneuver-effectiveness-next-step
tasks.command: $log = Get-Content .\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log; $m = $log | Select-String '^\[maneuver\] t=(\d+) target_id=(\d+) dv_cms=([-\d]+) dr_m=([-\d]+)$'; $r = $log | Select-String '^\[risk\] t=(\d+) id=(\d+) class=([A-Z-]+) prox=(\d+)$'; $riskMap = @{}; foreach($x in $r){ if($x.Line -match '^\[risk\] t=(\d+) id=(\d+) class=([A-Z-]+) prox=(\d+)$'){ $k = "$($matches[1])|$($matches[2])"; $riskMap[$k] = [int]$matches[4] } }; Write-Host 't,id,dv,dr,prox_t,prox_t+10,delta'; foreach($x in $m){ if($x.Line -match '^\[maneuver\] t=(\d+) target_id=(\d+) dv_cms=([-\d]+) dr_m=([-\d]+)$'){ $t=[int]$matches[1]; $id=[int]$matches[2]; $dv=[int]$matches[3]; $dr=[int]$matches[4]; $p0=$riskMap["$t|$id"]; $p1=$riskMap["$($t+10)|$id"]; if($null -ne $p0 -and $null -ne $p1){ $d=$p1-$p0; Write-Host "$t,$id,$dv,$dr,$p0,$p1,$d" } } }

tasks.label: check-maneuver-effectiveness-next-step-fixed
tasks.command: $log = Get-Content .\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log; $maneuvers = $log | Select-String '^\[maneuver\] t=(\d+) target_id=(\d+) dv_cms=(-?\d+) dr_m=(-?\d+)$'; $risks = $log | Select-String '^\[risk\] t=(\d+) id=(\d+) class=([A-Z-]+) prox=(\d+)$'; $riskMap = @{}; foreach($x in $risks){ if($x.Line -match '^\[risk\] t=(\d+) id=(\d+) class=([A-Z-]+) prox=(\d+)$'){ $k = ('{0}|{1}' -f $matches[1], $matches[2]); $riskMap[$k] = [int]$matches[4] } }; Write-Host 't,id,dv,dr,prox_t,prox_t+10,delta'; foreach($x in $maneuvers){ if($x.Line -match '^\[maneuver\] t=(\d+) target_id=(\d+) dv_cms=(-?\d+) dr_m=(-?\d+)$'){ $t=[int]$matches[1]; $id=[int]$matches[2]; $dv=[int]$matches[3]; $dr=[int]$matches[4]; $k0=('{0}|{1}' -f $t,$id); $k1=('{0}|{1}' -f ($t+10),$id); $p0=$riskMap[$k0]; $p1=$riskMap[$k1]; if(($null -ne $p0) -and ($null -ne $p1)){ $d=$p1-$p0; Write-Host ('{0},{1},{2},{3},{4},{5},{6}' -f $t,$id,$dv,$dr,$p0,$p1,$d) } } }

tasks.label: verify-predicted-direction-maneuvers
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; .\bin\sat_sim.exe .\scenarios\conic_scenario_dataset.json | Out-File -FilePath ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log -Encoding utf8; $log = Get-Content ..\results\conic_scenario_dataset.log; $maneuvers = $log | Select-String '^\[maneuver\] t=(\d+) target_id=(\d+) dv_cms=(-?\d+) dr_m=(-?\d+)$'; $risks = $log | Select-String '^\[risk\] t=(\d+) id=(\d+) class=([A-Z-]+) prox=(\d+)$'; $riskMap = @{}; foreach($x in $risks){ if($x.Line -match '^\[risk\] t=(\d+) id=(\d+) class=([A-Z-]+) prox=(\d+)$'){ $k = ('{0}|{1}' -f $matches[1], $matches[2]); $riskMap[$k] = [int]$matches[4] } }; Write-Host 't,id,dv,dr,prox_t,prox_t+10,delta'; foreach($x in $maneuvers){ if($x.Line -match '^\[maneuver\] t=(\d+) target_id=(\d+) dv_cms=(-?\d+) dr_m=(-?\d+)$'){ $t=[int]$matches[1]; $id=[int]$matches[2]; $dv=[int]$matches[3]; $dr=[int]$matches[4]; $k0=('{0}|{1}' -f $t,$id); $k1=('{0}|{1}' -f ($t+10),$id); $p0=$riskMap[$k0]; $p1=$riskMap[$k1]; if(($null -ne $p0) -and ($null -ne $p1)){ $d=$p1-$p0; Write-Host ('{0},{1},{2},{3},{4},{5},{6}' -f $t,$id,$dv,$dr,$p0,$p1,$d) } } }

tasks.label: run-new-edge-scenarios-and-verify
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; $scenarios = @('edge_flat_zero_horizon.json','edge_flat_zero_debris_long.json','edge_flat_max_debris.json','edge_flat_wraparound_theta.json','edge_flat_low_budget_stress.json'); foreach($s in $scenarios){ $out = "..\results\$($s -replace '.json','.log')"; .\bin\sat_sim.exe (".\scenarios\" + $s) | Out-File -FilePath $out -Encoding utf8; $log = Get-Content $out; $sum = ($log | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===').Count -gt 0; $risk = ($log | Select-String '^\[risk\]').Count; $man = ($log | Select-String '^\[maneuver\]').Count; $tele = ($log | Select-String '^\[telemetry\]').Count; $init = ($log | Select-String '^\[init\]').Count; $energy = ($log | Select-String '^energy_mj=' | Select-Object -Last 1).Line; $budget = ($log | Select-String '^budget_status=' | Select-Object -Last 1).Line; Write-Host ("SCENARIO={0} init={1} risk={2} maneuver={3} telemetry={4} summary={5}" -f $s,$init,$risk,$man,$tele,$sum); Write-Host $energy; Write-Host $budget }

tasks.label: run-new-edge-scenarios-and-verify-fixed
tasks.command: Set-Location .\part1; mingw32-make; $scenarios = @('edge_flat_zero_horizon.json','edge_flat_zero_debris_long.json','edge_flat_max_debris.json','edge_flat_wraparound_theta.json','edge_flat_low_budget_stress.json'); foreach($s in $scenarios){ $out = ('..\results\{0}' -f ($s -replace '.json','.log')); $scenarioPath = '.\scenarios\' + $s; .\bin\sat_sim.exe $scenarioPath | Out-File -FilePath $out -Encoding utf8; $log = Get-Content $out; $sum = ($log | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===').Count -gt 0; $risk = ($log | Select-String '^\[risk\]').Count; $man = ($log | Select-String '^\[maneuver\]').Count; $tele = ($log | Select-String '^\[telemetry\]').Count; $init = ($log | Select-String '^\[init\]').Count; $energy = ($log | Select-String '^energy_mj=' | Select-Object -Last 1).Line; $budget = ($log | Select-String '^budget_status=' | Select-Object -Last 1).Line; Write-Host ('SCENARIO={0} init={1} risk={2} maneuver={3} telemetry={4} summary={5}' -f $s,$init,$risk,$man,$tele,$sum); Write-Host $energy; Write-Host $budget }
